sentences.arabic: خَدِيجَةُ بِنْتُ خُوَيْلِدٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهَا كَانَتْ أَوَّلَ مَنْ آمَنَ بِالنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Hadidža bint Huvejlid, radijallahu anha, bila je prva žena koja je povjerovala u Vjerovjesnika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem.
sentences.translationEn: Khadijah bint Khuwaylid, may Allah be pleased with her, was the first woman to believe in the Prophet, peace be upon him.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ زَوْجَةً وَفِيَّةً وَعَوْنًا كَبِيرًا لِلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي بِدَايَةِ الدَّعْوَةِ [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ].
sentences.translation: Bila je vjerna supruga i velika podrška Vjerovjesniku, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, na početku poziva u islam [Bilježi Buharija u Knjizi o početku objave].
sentences.translationEn: She was a faithful wife and a great support to the Prophet at the beginning of the Islamic call [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation].

sentences.arabic: أَنْفَقَتْ مَالَهَا فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَوَقَفَتْ بِجَانِبِ زَوْجِهَا فِي أَصْعَبِ الْأَوْقَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Trošila je svoj imetak na Allahovom putu i stajala uz svoga supruga u najtežim trenucima.
sentences.translationEn: She spent her wealth in the way of Allah and stood by her husband in the most difficult times.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنْهَا: «آمَنَتْ بِي حِينَ كَفَرَ النَّاسُ» [رَوَاهُ أَحْمَدُ، وَصَحَّحَهُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je za nju: «Povjerovala je u mene kada su me ljudi porekli» [Bilježi Ahmed, a vjerodostojnim ga ocijenio Albani].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet said of her: 'She believed in me when people denied me' [Narrated by Ahmad, authenticated by al-Albani].

sentences.arabic: وَالدَّرْسُ أَنَّ الْمَرْأَةَ الْمُسْلِمَةَ تَكُونُ رُكِيزَةً لِأَهْلِهَا وَمُجْتَمَعِهَا.
sentences.translation: Pouka je da muslimanka bude oslonac svojoj porodici i društvu.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson is that a Muslim woman can be a pillar of strength for her family and community.
